sentences.arabic: آلَةُ الْعُودِ هِيَ مَلِكَةُ الْآلَاتِ فِي الْمُوسِيقَى الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Oud je kraljica instrumenata u arapskoj muzici.
sentences.translationEn: The oud is the queen of instruments in Arabic music.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِكُ هَذِهِ الْآلَةُ صَوْتًا دَافِئًا وَجَمِيلًا يُعَبِّرُ عَنِ الْمَشَاعِرِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj instrument ima topao i lijep zvuk koji izražava osjećaje.
sentences.translationEn: This instrument has a warm and beautiful sound that expresses emotions.

sentences.arabic: يَعْزِفُ الْفَنَّانُونَ أَلْحَانًا قَدِيمَةً وَحَدِيثَةً فِي الْحَفَلَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnici sviraju stare i moderne melodije na koncertima.
sentences.translationEn: Artists play old and modern melodies at concerts.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ الْعَزْفَ عَلَى الْعُودِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى التُّرَاثِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi uče svirati oud kako bi sačuvali tradiciju.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people learn to play the oud to preserve heritage.
